vocabulary.definition: having less color than usual in the face; looking unwell
vocabulary.example: In the weeks that followed he did seem to be getting paler and thinner, but it didn’t look as though he’d cracked yet.

vocabulary.definition: to make something illegal by official rule
vocabulary.example: “Dragon breeding was outlawed by the Warlocks’ Convention of 1709, everyone knows that.

vocabulary.definition: uncomfortably hot with little fresh air
a piece of magic put on an object or place
vocabulary.example: … he borrowed Fluffy from me… then some o’ the teachers did enchantments… Professor Sprout—Professor Flitwick—Professor McGonagall—” he ticked them off

vocabulary.definition: to come out of an egg
vocabulary.example: He had written only two words: It’s hatching.
It snapped at his fingers, showing pointed fangs.

vocabulary.definition: looking dishonest or like you are hiding something
vocabulary.example: he said, in a shifty voice that got their interest at once.

vocabulary.definition: containing poison that can harm or kill
vocabulary.example: It looked as if Norbert’s fangs were poisonous.

vocabulary.definition: a punishment that keeps students after hours for breaking rules
to move quickly down through the air
vocabulary.example: About ten minutes later, four broomsticks came swooping down out of the darkness.

vocabulary.definition: made quieter or harder to hear
vocabulary.example: said Hagrid in a muffled voice.
So now they had something else to worry about: what might happen to Hagrid if anyone found out he was hiding an illegal dragon in his hut.

characters.name: Harry Potter
characters.description: Helps investigate Hagrid's secret and plans how to get rid of the dragon.

characters.name: Rubeus Hagrid
characters.description: Wins a dragon egg in a card game and tries to raise Norbert in his hut.

characters.name: Hermione Granger
characters.description: Pushes exam study while also trying to save Hagrid from disaster.

characters.name: Draco Malfoy
characters.description: Spots the dragon and tries to expose Harry's midnight plan.

background.hook: Exams loom and homework piles up, but Hagrid is acting strangely in the library. When the trio visits his sweltering hut, they discover a dragon egg in the fire — and once Norbert hatches, they must find a way to send him to Charlie before Malfoy ruins everything.
background.readingFocus: Follow how the trio figures out what Hagrid is hiding. Watch what happens when Malfoy sees the dragon, and notice how the midnight delivery plan almost works — until they forget the Invisibility Cloak.

miniCheck.stem: If something is illegal, it is —

comprehension.stem: What is this chapter mainly about?

options.text: Hagrid secretly raises a Norwegian Ridgeback dragon, and the trio smuggles Norbert to Charlie's friends at midnight
The trio takes their final exams and goes home for summer
Harry wins another Quidditch match against Slytherin
Snape steals the Sorcerer's Stone from Gringotts

comprehension.explanation: Hagrid hatches Norbert, Malfoy discovers him, and Harry and Hermione carry the dragon to the tallest tower while Ron is bitten and stuck in the hospital wing.

comprehension.stem: How did Hagrid get the dragon egg?

options.text: He won it playing cards with a stranger in the village
Dumbledore gave it to him as a birthday gift
He found it in the Forbidden Forest

comprehension.explanation: Hagrid says he won the egg last night in a card game with a stranger at the pub.

comprehension.stem: What kind of dragon is Norbert?
comprehension.explanation: Hagrid reads that the egg is a Norwegian Ridgeback, and they are rare.

comprehension.stem: Who saw the dragon through Hagrid's curtains?
comprehension.explanation: Hagrid spots a kid at the window; Harry sees Malfoy running back to the school.

comprehension.stem: Why can't Ron go to the tower on Saturday night?

options.text: Norbert bit his hand and it swelled up with poison
He forgot the plan and went to bed

comprehension.explanation: Ron's bitten hand swells to twice its size and turns green; he ends up in the hospital wing.

comprehension.stem: What happens to Malfoy on the way up the tower?

options.text: McGonagall catches him and gives him detention
He helps Harry carry the crate
Filch rewards him for telling the truth
Charlie's friends take him to Romania

comprehension.explanation: McGonagall grabs Malfoy by the ear, takes twenty points from Slytherin, and gives him detention.

comprehension.stem: Why do Harry and Hermione get caught after the dragon is gone?

options.text: They left the Invisibility Cloak on top of the tower
Norbert bit Filch on the leg
Peeves told McGonagall where they were
They forgot to send Hedwig to Charlie

comprehension.explanation: Filch catches them in the corridor because they left the cloak behind on the tower.

options.text: hide it in a library book

vocabulary.explanation: Dragon breeding was outlawed by the Warlocks' Convention of 1709.

vocabulary.stem: It was ___ hot inside Hagrid's hut.
vocabulary.explanation: The hut is unbearably hot even on a warm day because of the blazing fire.
The baby dragon snaps at Hagrid and shows pointed fangs.

vocabulary.stem: Which word is closest in meaning to 'shifty'?
vocabulary.explanation: Hagrid speaks in a shifty voice while hiding something behind his back.

vocabulary.stem: Charlie's friends mustn't be seen carrying an ___ dragon.
vocabulary.explanation: Charlie warns that his friends cannot be seen transporting an illegal dragon.

cloze.title: Norbert the Norwegian Ridgeback
paragraphs: Quirrell grows (1) ___ and thinner while the trio studies for exams. In the library, Hagrid speaks in a (2) ___ voice and was looking up books about dragons, which are (3) ___ in Britain.
Hagrid keeps a dragon egg in his (4) ___ hut until Norbert (5) ___s. The baby dragon shows sharp (6) ___s, and soon Malfoy sees him.
Charlie's friends arrive by (7) ___ broomstick to take Norbert away, but Harry and Hermione forget the Invisibility Cloak and Filch catches them.

gaps.explanation: Quirrell seems to be getting paler and thinner.
Hagrid answers in a shifty voice while hiding something.
Dragon breeding was outlawed by the Warlocks' Convention.
It is stifling hot inside the hut with the fire blazing.
Hagrid's note says only two words: It's hatching.
The dragon snaps and shows pointed fangs.
Four broomsticks come swooping down from the darkness.
